line: Implemented I/O metrics collection and propagation across the watcher stack.

items: `crates/saw-daemon/src/process_monitor.rs`

line: - Added per-sample I/O rate calculation from `Process::disk_usage()`.

items: Added per-sample I/O rate calculation from `Process::disk_usage()`.
`ProcessMetrics` events now include `io_read_rate` and `io_write_rate`.

line: - Added tests for rate calculation and dead-event zero-rate behavior.

items: Added tests for rate calculation and dead-event zero-rate behavior.
`crates/saw-core/src/types.rs`
Extended `ProcessMetrics` with `io_read_rate` and `io_write_rate`.
Extended `AgentState` with `latest_io_read_rate`, `latest_io_write_rate`, and `last_io_activity_at`.

line: - State now records last non-zero I/O activity timestamp.

items: State now records last non-zero I/O activity timestamp.

line: - Added unit test for zero/non-zero I/O activity tracking.

items: Added unit test for zero/non-zero I/O activity tracking.
`crates/saw-core/src/metrics.rs`
Added `compute_io_rate(...)`.
Added `has_recent_io_activity(...)`.

line: - Added unit tests for rate calculation and 60s zero-I/O window behavior.

items: Added unit tests for rate calculation and 60s zero-I/O window behavior.
`crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs`
Added `io_inactive_after` to `ClassifierConfig` with default `60s`.

line: - `ApiHang` now requires both API silence and no recent I/O activity.

items: `ApiHang` now requires both API silence and no recent I/O activity.

line: - This makes zero I/O for >60s a secondary stuck signal.

items: This makes zero I/O for >60s a secondary stuck signal.
`crates/saw-core/src/lib.rs`
Re-exported new metric helpers.

line: - Added classifier test proving recent I/O suppresses false ApiHang.

items: Added classifier test proving recent I/O suppresses false ApiHang.
`src/cmd/watch.rs`
Added human-readable I/O rate formatting.

line: - Plain-text status output now includes `io_read` and `io_write` rates.

items: Plain-text status output now includes `io_read` and `io_write` rates.

line: - The repo already tracked cumulative I/O bytes in `process_monitor`, so the safe path was to extend that existing event flow instead of introducing a new observer.

items: The repo already tracked cumulative I/O bytes in `process_monitor`, so the safe path was to extend that existing event flow instead of introducing a new observer.

line: - Running multiple `cargo test` commands in parallel caused noisy failures/cancellations due to shared artifact locking; sequential targeted runs were the reliable verification path.

items: Running multiple `cargo test` commands in parallel caused noisy failures/cancellations due to shared artifact locking; sequential targeted runs were the reliable verification path.

line: - A pre-existing guard-selection edge case surfaced during testing and was corrected by preferring the most specific matching guard candidate.

items: A pre-existing guard-selection edge case surfaced during testing and was corrected by preferring the most specific matching guard candidate.

line: - Used `delta bytes / elapsed seconds` for rate calculation with saturating subtraction.

items: Used `delta bytes / elapsed seconds` for rate calculation with saturating subtraction.

line: - Kept first sample rates at `0.0` because there is no previous baseline.

items: Kept first sample rates at `0.0` because there is no previous baseline.

line: - Tracked `last_io_activity_at` only when either I/O rate is non-zero.

items: Tracked `last_io_activity_at` only when either I/O rate is non-zero.

line: - Treated I/O as a secondary signal for stuck detection by gating `ApiHang` on both silence and I/O inactivity.

items: Treated I/O as a secondary signal for stuck detection by gating `ApiHang` on both silence and I/O inactivity.

line: - Interpreted “metrics panel” using the current plain-text watch status output, since this repo does not yet contain a TUI metrics panel implementation.

items: Interpreted “metrics panel” using the current plain-text watch status output, since this repo does not yet contain a TUI metrics panel implementation.

line: - The acceptance item “metrics panel shows I/O rate” is satisfied in the current CLI watch output, not a TUI panel, because no TUI/metrics-panel code exists in this repo yet.

items: The acceptance item “metrics panel shows I/O rate” is satisfied in the current CLI watch output, not a TUI panel, because no TUI/metrics-panel code exists in this repo yet.

line: - One test run briefly waited on a Cargo artifact lock; subsequent sequential runs passed.

items: One test run briefly waited on a Cargo artifact lock; subsequent sequential runs passed.

line: - `cargo test -p saw-core types::tests -- --nocapture && cargo test --bin saw watch::tests -- --nocapture`
